subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Garden hath been honored by the advent of its Lord, the All-Merciful, and when He descended therein He revealed verses in such wise as to enchant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه تشرف البستان بقدوم ربه الرحمن و اذا نزل فیه انزل الآیات علی شان انجذبت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
